# Contract Generated by GPT-4.1 Mini

**Model ID:** `gpt-4.1-mini`

---

## Freelance Service Agreement

### Preamble

This Freelance Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of January 15, 2025 ("Effective Date"), by and between Sarah Johnson, Marketing Director of TechStartup Inc. ("Client"), and Alex Chen, Senior Designer of Chen Creative Studio ("Freelancer"). The parties agree as follows:

### Recitals

WHEREAS, Client desires to engage Freelancer to perform certain design services related to the project titled "Brand Refresh 2025" involving a complete visual identity redesign including logo, color palette, typography, and brand guidelines document; and

WHEREAS, Freelancer agrees to provide such services under the terms and conditions set forth in this Agreement.

---

## Clauses (10 total)

### Scope of Work

*Type: standard*

Freelancer shall provide design services including three logo concepts, refinement of the selected logo, preparation of the brand guidelines document, and delivery of the final asset package as detailed in the project description. All deliverables and due dates are specified in this Agreement.

### Payment Terms

*Type: standard*

The total contract amount is $8,500. Client shall pay a deposit of $2,550 upon execution of this Agreement. The balance shall be paid according to the following milestone schedule:

- $2,000 upon delivery of logo concepts due by January 30, 2025;
- $1,500 upon delivery of selected logo refinement due by February 15, 2025;
- $2,500 upon delivery of brand guidelines document due by March 1, 2025;
- $2,500 upon delivery of asset package due by March 15, 2025.

Payments shall be made within fifteen (15) days of invoice receipt. Late payments may incur interest as permitted under California law.

### Revision Policy

*Type: standard*

Client is entitled to three (3) rounds of revisions during the project. Additional revisions beyond this scope may be subject to additional fees agreed in writing by the parties.

### Project Timeline and Deadlines

*Type: standard*

The project shall commence on the Effective Date and be completed by March 15, 2025. Freelancer agrees to adhere to the deliverable due dates specified herein. Client acknowledges that delays in providing feedback may affect the timeline.

### Ownership and Intellectual Property

*Type: standard*

Upon full payment, Freelancer shall assign to Client all rights, title, and interest in the final deliverables. Freelancer retains ownership of any preliminary materials and rights to use the work for portfolio purposes, unless otherwise agreed in writing.

### Confidentiality

*Type: standard*

Both parties agree to keep confidential any proprietary or confidential information disclosed during the project and to use such information solely for the purposes of performing this Agreement.

### Termination

*Type: standard*

Either party may terminate this Agreement upon written notice if the other party breaches any material term and fails to cure such breach within ten (10) days of notice. Upon termination, Client shall pay for all services performed up to the date of termination.

### Independent Contractor Relationship

*Type: standard*

Freelancer is an independent contractor and not an employee or agent of Client. Freelancer shall be responsible for all taxes and legal obligations related to the performance of services under this Agreement.

### Governing Law and Jurisdiction

*Type: standard*

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California. Any disputes arising out of this Agreement shall be resolved in the state or federal courts located in California.

### Entire Agreement

*Type: standard*

This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties concerning its subject matter and supersedes all prior discussions and agreements, whether written or oral. Any amendments must be made in writing and signed by both parties.
